title: [MTR4] Wright Buses Pack
description: Single-decker Wright buses for MTR mod!
body:
# Wright Buses Pack
![Banner image for Wright Buses Pack, featuring the 2 buses available in the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fce06644c5ad3b53dbbd5c5df701e415aef84328.png)
This resource pack adds 2 Wright bodied buses for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod, with it being a remodelled version of the Enviro200MMC from the resource pack of the same name.
## Buses
- Volvo B7RLE (Wright Eclipse 1)
- Wright GB Hawk
## Notes
This pack requires the [ADL Enviro200MMC Buses](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mtr4-adl-enviro-200mmc-buses) pack to function! The buses will not show without this pack.
